datasets.title: BeCrop Soil Microbiome Test — KMO Garden Entry (LOC_01), Honolulu, March 2026
datasets.description: Soil microbiome characterization for a flower-crop site (KMO Garden Entry, internal label LOC_01) in Honolulu, O'ahu, analyzed by Biome Makers using the BeCrop Test v4.0 ITS3 + 16S4 sequencing panel. Long-format CSV: each row is a single metric (numeric or ordinal class) reported by the lab, covering biosustainability summary, microbiome quantification, macro/minor nutrient cycling, pathogen panel, biocontrol agents, hormone production, and stress adaptation. Site coordinates and submission metadata sourced from the contributor's BeCrop sample registration form. The source PDF report (DU5000_KMO-SAMPLE-01.pdf) is included alongside the CSV for full provenance.
datasets.citation: Biome Makers Inc. 2026. BeCrop Test v4.0 Microbiome Analysis Report DU5000 (sample KMO_SAMPLE_01). Davis, CA / Valladolid, Spain.

sample_context.lab_facility: Biome Makers, Davis CA / Valladolid Spain
sample_context.submission_form: Becrop_Samples_DU5.xlsx (kept private in /samples; contains submitter PII)
